extension.name: AI Boost — OpenGraph (Pro)
extension.author: AI Boost Team
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 2 or later
extension.description: AI Boost — OpenGraph Pro upgrade plugin. Installs the closed-source Pro layer for the 'og' SKU. Requires a verified OpenGraph Pro license entered on Components → AI Boost → Licenses. No functionality is added until the license is verified active.
